use_cases: Landing page hero backgrounds with a cyberpunk/digital aesthetic
Loading screens or splash pages with animated visual interest
Product hero sections requiring a tech-focused mood
ai_summary: A canvas-based falling symbols background component that renders a matrix-style digital rain animation with customizable characters, colors, font size, and animation speed. Features a dark theme with semi-transparent falling symbols and optional outer vignette effect. Designed as a background layer for landing pages and hero sections in SaaS and dev-tool products.
